productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Grey Tops
description: Composition Grey tube top made of 92% polyamide and 8% elastane, and has ribbing on the top and bottom hems Fitting Comfort  Wash care only hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery  Get stylish, get feminine with this grey tube top from united colors of benetton. The polyamide-elastane fabric sits snug on your torso, offering a fresh and comfortable feel. Team it with jeans or short skirts, a military sleeve jacket and stilletos. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'8' and chest 33"
